metadata.name: Play Command Tower — produces any color of commander's identity
metadata.description: p1 plays a Command Tower as their land for the turn. Then activates it to add {G} (one color from their commander's color identity). Tests that Command Tower enters untapped and its mana ability produces mana.
metadata.generation_notes: Command Tower oracle: '{T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.' CR 305.1: Playing a land is a special action, doesn't use the stack. Command Tower enters untapped. Then p1 taps it for {G}. Initial: p1 has Command Tower in hand, land_plays_remaining = 1. After play: Command Tower on battlefield untapped, land_plays_remaining = 0. After activate: tapped, mana added.

script.step_note: p1 plays Command Tower as their land for the turn.

actions.description: Initial: Command Tower in hand, 1 land play remaining

actions.note: CR 305.1: p1 plays Command Tower as their land for the turn (special action, no stack).

actions.description: Command Tower on battlefield (untapped), hand empty
actions.note: Command Tower entered untapped. Land play used (0 remaining).
CR 605.3: p1 taps Command Tower for mana (mana ability, no stack).

actions.description: Command Tower tapped after mana ability
actions.note: Command Tower tapped, mana added to pool.
